ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_WEIRD_EGG.title: [Persona: Steamed Egg]
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_WEIRD_EGG.descript: At the start of every 3rd turn, add 1 [card]Trouble Maker[/card] to your hand. Combat end also reduces this relic's cooldown by 1 turn.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_WEIRD_EGG.flavor: It always finds the perfect beat for the worst possible idea.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_SAMURAI_PRAWN.desc: At the start of every 3rd turn, add 1 [card]Famous Blade[/card] to your hand. Combat end also reduces this relic's cooldown by 1 turn. The first time each turn you attack an enemy, gain 1 stack of [power]Sword Aura[/power]. The first 2 stacks each make your attacks deal 1 extra damage. The 3rd stack makes your attacks deal 2 extra damage. Maximum 3 stacks.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_SAMURAI_PRAWN.flav: A single slash settles the stance. The third slash settles the battle.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_SLIME_LULU.title: [Persona: Slime Lulu]
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_SLIME_LULU.descrip: Lose 10 Max HP. When taking damage, gain 1 stack of [power]Half Life Heal[/power] and reduce this effect's cooldown by 1 turn. Combat end also reduces this relic's cooldown by 1 turn. At the start of every 3rd turn, add 1 [card]Healing Slime[/card] to your hand.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_BIONIC_JASMINE.des: Gain [gold]Steps[/gold] when entering rooms. At combat start, lose 1 Strength and 1 Dexterity. Every 13 steps gained grants 1 Strength/Dexterity (alternating). Lose combat-gained Strength/Dexterity after combat ends.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_PROPRIETRESS.title: [Persona: Proprietress]
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_PROPRIETRESS.descr: When entering a shop, gain gold equal to 10 times the number of shops you have entered this run. While any player has this relic, every player's shop cards, potions, relics, and card removal service each have a 3% chance to cost only 30% of their normal price. This chance increases by 3% each time you pass through a shop. Combat end also reduces this relic's cooldown by 1 turn. At the start of every 3rd turn, trigger this relic's combat effect.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_PROPRIETRESS.flavo: Business is business. Bargains are personal.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_MOUSY_LIAN.title: [Persona: Mousy Lian]
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_MOUSY_LIAN.descrip: At the start of every 3rd turn, add 1 [card]Mousy Save Me[/card] to your hand. Combat end also reduces this relic's cooldown by 1 turn.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_MOUSY_LIAN.flavor: A tiny rescue can still change the whole fight.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_BLUE_WHALE.title: [Persona: Blue Whale]
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_BLUE_WHALE.descrip: At the start of every 3rd turn, add 1 [card]Weak Imprint[/card] to your hand. Defeating an enemy with [power]Weak Imprint[/power] gives you 3 Gold. If combat ends exactly on turn 6, gain 6 Gold. Each later repeat adds 2 more Gold to that reward. Combat end also reduces this relic's cooldown by 1 turn.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_BLUE_WHALE.flavor: The future has already been decided!
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_MASCOT_GIRL_MIMI.d: At the start of every 3rd turn, add 1 [card]Product Restocking[/card] to your hand. Whenever [card]Product Restocking[/card] discards a card, gain 1 [gold]StarLight[/gold]. Combat end also reduces this relic's cooldown by 1 turn.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_MASCOT_GIRL_MIMI.f: A full shelf is nice. A refilled hand is better.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_OASIS_QUEEN.title: [Persona: Oasis Queen]
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_OASIS_QUEEN.descri: At the start of every 3rd turn, add 1 [card]Royal Prerogative[/card] to your hand. Deal 1 extra damage for each [gold]Temporary[/gold] card in your hand, up to 3. Combat end also reduces this relic's cooldown by 1 turn.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_OASIS_QUEEN.flavor: What stays, what goes, and what shines all answer to the queen.
At the start of every 3rd turn, add 1 [card]Shadow Fusion[/card] to your hand. At the start of your turn, apply 1 [power]Twin Shadows[/power] to a random enemy. Whenever you play an Attack card that costs 1 to 3 Energy targeting an enemy, apply 1 [power]Twin Shadows[/power] to that target, up to your current [power]Shadow Quota[/power] limit each turn. Entering an Elite room gives you 1 [power]Hunter's Feast[/power]. Entering a Boss room gives you 3 [power]Hunter's Feast[/power]. At the end of that combat, each stack of [power]Hunter's Feast[/power] permanently increases your [power]Shadow Quota[/power] limit by 1. Combat end also reduces this relic's cooldown by 1 turn.
A small shadow is still enough to leave a mark.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSONALITY_DERIVATIVE_PR: Every 2 rooms, gain Gold equal to this relic's counter. [card]Transfer[/card] increases that counter by 1. This counter has no cap.
Money likes finding its way back with friends.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_PROPRIETRESS_WEALT: Every 2 rooms, gain Gold equal to this relic's counter. [card]Transfer[/card] increases that counter by 1. This counter has no cap.
Money likes finding its way back with friends.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_SUPERMAN_MEGAS.des: At the start of every 3rd turn, add 1 [card]Orbital Bombardment[/card] to your hand. Combat end also reduces this relic's cooldown by 1 turn. At turn end, if you have fewer than 5 cards in hand, draw 1 extra card next turn. After playing [card]Orbital Bombardment[/card], draw 1 card.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_SUPERMAN_MEGAS.fla: Less in hand. More from orbit.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_XIAO_LEI.title: [Persona: Xiao Lei]
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_XIAO_LEI.descripti: At the start of every 3rd turn, add 1 [card]Chain Reaction[/card] to your hand. Whenever you cause another player to gain a card, gain 1 [power]Dragon Awakening[/power]. After enduring Seventy-Two Heavenly Thunders and Thirty-Six Heavenly Fires, unlock [power]True Dragon Form[/power].
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_XIAO_LEI.flavor: No dragon crosses the gate before surviving the storm.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSONALITY_DERIVATIVE_XI: At the end of combat, reduce Seventy-Two Heavenly Thunders by your [power]Dragon Awakening[/power]. Whenever you take damage, reduce Thirty-Six Heavenly Fires by 1. Once both trials reach 0, at the start of each combat gain [power]True Dragon Form[/power] and add 1 [card]Dragon's Roar[/card] to your hand.
The gate yields only after thunder and fire have both been spent.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSONALITY_DERIVATIVE_SW: Starts at 0 and does not grow on its own. Every 2 total [power]Sword Aura[/power] consumed by [card]Famous Blade[/card] increases this relic's counter by 1. Each time you play [card]Famous Blade[/card], deal bonus damage to the target equal to this relic's counter.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_JILL_STEINLE.title: [Persona: Bartender]
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_JILL_STEINLE.descr: At the start of every 3rd turn, add 1 [card]Mixed Cocktails[/card] to your hand. If [card]Mixed Cocktails[/card] discards exactly 3 cards with all different types, gain 3 [gold]StarLight[/gold]. If it discards exactly 3 cards of the same type, the target gains 3 extra [green]Dexterity[/green].
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_SOCIAL_FEAR_NUN.de: At the start of every 3rd turn, add 1 [card]Iron Virgin[/card] to your hand. At the start of each turn, apply [power]Boundary Reinforcement[/power].
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_BLUE_OCTAHEDRAL_DIE: Whenever you end combat on exactly a multiple of 8 turns, gain 8 [gold]StarLight[/gold].
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_BLUE_BANK_CARD_GENE: Not much at once. Plenty if you keep going.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_BLUE_MOTORCYCLE_HEL: At the start of each turn, gain 2 Block.
Secure the helmet first. Worry about speed later.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_BLUE_PIGGY_BANK.fla: Bank the effort first. Cash out the sparkle later.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_BLUE_SANDWICH_BISCU: A simple bite with surprisingly lasting mileage.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_GOLD_BANK_CARD_PREM: Every 3 floors climbed, gain 3 Gold. At combat start, all players gain 1 [gold]StarLight[/gold].
One swipe, and everyone glows a little brighter.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_GOLD_MOTORCYCLE_HEL: At combat start, gain 1 [green]Dexterity[/green]. At the start of each turn, gain 4 Block.
Premium protection makes every line feel cleaner.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_GOLD_STAR_COIN_HAMM: If you have at least 150 Gold, the first time each turn you deal damage, spend 20 Gold and deal bonus damage to that target equal to 7.5% of your current Gold.
The heavier the purse, the harder the swing.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_PURPLE_BANK_CARD_IN: A thicker balance makes the climb feel lighter.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_PURPLE_MOTORCYCLE_H: At the start of each turn, gain 4 Block.
A steadier shell makes risk feel negotiable.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_PURPLE_SANDWICH_BIS: Gain 15 Max HP. At the start of each turn, if your current HP is below 50% of your Max HP, gain 1 [gold]Counter[/gold].
Well fed, well braced, and ready to bite back.
